untranslatable_reason: The signal references 'oscillator' and 'trend moving average' as parameters without specifying which indicators to use. The source text is fragmentary and does not clearly identify the oscillator type (e.g., RSI, Stochastic, MACD) or trend MA period. Substituted MACD as a reasonable oscillator proxy, but this may not match the original intent. Author did not specify parameters.
translation_notes: Signal direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT (long on down-cross with rising lows, short on up-cross with declining highs). Used MACD as oscillator proxy since specific oscillator was not named. Used prev_low and prev_high for bar comparison instead of array indexing. Exit conditions inferred as reversal of entry signals per AUTHOR_SILENT rule.
